title: Skills gap: build Agentforce/Data Cloud implementation proof pack
description: First action: create `skills/agentforce-data-cloud/SKILL.md` with fit criteria, discovery checklist, demo/proof artifacts, no-Apex boundaries, and smoke-test steps. Why it matters: current AI Implementation Lead and Agentforce SE roles explicitly value Data Cloud, Agentforce, Flow Builder, and agent configuration; JT needs proof language without drifting into developer-only Salesforce work. Done: skill exists, references `docs/tools/salesforce-data-cloud.md`, includes client/job-market proof artifacts, and passes a quick validation run.
